translations.Somali: Salaan. Magacaygu waa …
Salaan. Anigu waxaan ahay …
Farxad baan ku baranayaa. Anigu waxaan ahay …
Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan ku barto. Anigu waxaan ahay …

lesson.text: It’s a pleasure to see you. I’m…

translations.Somali: Farxad bay ii tahay inaan ku arko. Anigu waxaan ahay …
Ma isbaran karnaa? Anigu waxaan ahay …

lesson.text: How do you do? My name is…

translations.Somali: Sidee tahay? Magacaygu waa…
Aan isku baro. Anigu waxaan ahay …

lesson.text: I’d like to introduce myself. I’m …

translations.Somali: Waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan isbaro. Anigu waxaan ahay …

lesson.text: John, I’d like to introduce you to Mary.

translations.Somali: John, waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan ku baro Mary.
John, fadlan la kulan Mary.

lesson.text: John, I’d like you to meet Mary.

translations.Somali: John, waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaad la kulanto Mary.
John, ma la kulantay Mary?

lesson.text: John, let me introduce you to Mary.

translations.Somali: John, aan ku baro Mary.

lesson.text: John, this is Mary. Mary, this is John.

translations.Somali: John, kani waa Mary. Mary, kani waa John.
Farxad baan ku baranayaa.
Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan ku barto.

lesson.text: It’s a pleasure to meet you.

translations.Somali: Farxad bay ii tahay inaan ku barto.
Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan ku barto.
Sidee tahay?
